parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.user_id, u.name, u.total_goals,
  t.trivia_id, t.trivia_number, t.correct_option,
  t.sent_at, t.closes_at, t.status as trivia_status,
  (SELECT response_id FROM ct_trivia_responses
   WHERE trivia_id = t.trivia_id AND user_id = u.user_id LIMIT 1) AS existing_response
FROM ct_users u, ct_trivias t
WHERE u.phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'
  AND t.trivia_id = '{{ $json.trivia_id }}'

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO ct_trivia_responses
    (trivia_id, user_id, phone, selected_option, is_correct, responded_at,
     response_seconds, speed_range, base_goals, speed_bonus, total_goals, final_goals)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.trivia_id }}', '{{ $json.user_id }}', '{{ $json.phone }}',
    '{{ $json.selected_option }}', {{ $json.is_correct === 'true' }},
    NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota',
    {{ $json.elapsed_seconds }}, {{ $json.speed_range }},
    {{ $json.base_goals }}, {{ $json.speed_bonus }},
    {{ $json.total_goals_trivia }}, {{ $json.total_goals_trivia }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (trivia_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING response_id
)
SELECT response_id FROM ins
UPDATE ct_users SET total_goals = total_goals + {{ $('Calcular Scoring').first().json.total_goals_trivia }}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = '{{ $('Calcular Scoring').first().json.user_id }}'
